# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create Kong API Gateway configuration using declarative YAML. Define services and routes for microservices endpoints. Set up upstream targets and load balancing. This is for our API management platform.
# Category: kong_no_auth

_format_version: "2.1"
services:
  - name: user-service
    url: http://user-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: user-service-route
        paths:
          - /users
          - /users/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit:
            - 1000
          window_size:
            - 60
          policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: user-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: user-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: user-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: user-service-3:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: roundrobin

  - name: order-service
    url: http://order-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: order-service-route
        paths:
          - /orders
          - /orders/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit:
            - 500
          window_size:
            - 60
          policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: order-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: order-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: order-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: roundrobin

  - name: product-service
    url: http://product-service:8080
    routes:
      - name: product-service-route
        paths:
          - /products
          - /products/*
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: true
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          limit:
            - 2000
          window_size:
            - 60
          policy: local
    upstreams:
      - name: product-service-upstream
        targets:
          - target: product-service-1:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-2:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-3:8080
            weight: 100
          - target: product-service-4:8080
            weight: 100
        algorithm: roundrobin
